message:
Merge PR #2053: fix(done): make gt done idempotent by checking wisps table for existing MR beads

Bug fix: MR beads created with --ephemeral live in wisps table, but
FindMRForBranch only checked issues table. Retry would hit UNIQUE constraint.
Now checks wisps table too.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2053
Author: Rome-1 (Rome Thorstenson)
